Helldivers Loadout Tool (Packaged Build)

IMPORTANT:
Do not remove, rename, or move the _internal folder.

This app requires the _internal folder to be in the same directory as
HelldiversLoadoutTool.exe. If _internal is missing, the app may fail to start
or features/data loading may break.

Keep this folder structure:

HelldiversLoadoutTool/
  HelldiversLoadoutTool.exe
  _internal/
